offer: For construction project accountants processing 5–15 invoices/month, inefficient reconciliation causes cash flow gaps. We streamline the reconciliation process instead of manual reconciliation processes.
problem: Reconciling subcontractor invoices and payments efficiently.
channels_free: Post in Reddit communities for construction project accountants
Indie Hackers discussions on similar workflows
DM outreach to construction project accountants with demo video
Community forums where accountants share tools
try_it: Let users try manual invoice entry and basic reporting on payments
pay: unknown with a clear upgrade path
cheap_execution_checklist: 1-page landing page with the one-liner and CTA
Short demo video showing manual-first workflow
Collect 10 short interviews from target users
Offer early-access onboarding for first 10 users
Post weekly progress updates in relevant communities
